top_signals.title: Stocks Get Tech Boost as Oil Declines Below $90: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A tech-led rebound on Wall Street powered ahead, with stocks joining bonds higher as oil fell amid hopes the US and Iran are getting closer to a deal to end the war that has rattled global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Starmer: X is responsible for fake Farage and Bailey fight images
top_signals.summary: Sir Keir Starmer has said tech firms must take responsibility for fake images depicting a brawl between Nigel Farage and Bank of England governor Andrew Bailey.  Multiple AI-generated images of Farage and Bailey fighting have been spread on X, with the links appearing to lead to a scam.  The Prime Minister’s spokesman said “there is [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Eastern Shipbuilding Delives Ferry Falcon for Fisher Island
top_signals.summary: Eastern Shipbuilding Group delivered the vehicle-passenger ferry Falcon to the Fisher Island Community Association (FICA), where it aims to provide reliable transportation service to the Fisher Island community.Falcon completed trials prior…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
